scores.notes: Key issues include misspellings such as 'Germany (EUA)' instead of 'Germany (GER)', 'Italy (iT)' instead of 'Italy (ITA)', and 'Switzerland (su!)' instead of 'Switzerland (SUI)'. The table structure is mostly preserved but with some alignment issues. Numeric values are mostly accurate, but the layout has some inconsistencies in reading order and section preservation.
